# arubasdwan_security_zone (Resource)

Manages a security zone in the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator. Uses the /gms/rest/zones API endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "arubasdwan_security_zone" "example" {
  name = "Production"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the security zone.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the security zone, assigned by the Orchestrator.
